scripts.build: npm run validate:stage2 && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build && npm run validate:stage3 && npm run validate:stage4 && npm run validate:stage5 && npm run validate:stage6 && npm run validate:stage7 && npm run validate:release
scripts.validate:release: node scripts/validate-release.mjs && node scripts/validate-visible-contract.mjs && node scripts/validate-schema-semantics.mjs && node scripts/validate-nine-stage-audit.mjs && node scripts/validate-passage-depth.mjs
